positive: A stylized, vibrant celestial nebula flowing through geometric botanical forms. The main subject is a central, symmetrical arrangement of intertwining cosmic vines and glowing bioluminescent flora. The style is highly detailed vector illustration with a slight cyberpunk/art deco influence. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, vibrant teal, electric lavender, and soft gold accents. Composition must be perfectly centered and designed to fit on fabric, featuring clean, bold silhouettes that pop against a solid background color (suggest background solid color of charcoal grey). Emphasis on negative space, crisp linework, and strong, ambient backlighting giving a glowing effect. Minimalist yet complex, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, bokeh, text, logo, watermark, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, poorly rendered hands, disfigured, low quality, noisy, grain, photorealistic, 3D render, grayscale, sketch, messy lines, jpeg artifacts
